name: Tianjin Quanyechang (Group) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Tianjin Quanyechang (Group) Co., Ltd. operates department stores and supermarkets in Tianjin, China. Its stores offer dresses, jackets, sweaters, tops, trousers, sweater suits for women and children. Tianjin Quanyechang (Group) Co., Ltd. is based in Tianjin, China.
